query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Diagonal streaks of vibrant color sweep across the frame in flowing bands of red, coral, pale yellow, and bright green, creating an abstract composition of curved, overlapping lines that suggest vegetal or floral subject matter seen through motion.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Diagonal streaks of vibrant color sweep across the frame in flowing bands of red, coral, pale yellow, and bright green, rendered as abstract motion-blurred arcs through intentional camera movement or subject motion during exposure; the vegetal or floral source dissolves entirely into gestural streaks, producing an abstract photographic image where representational clarity is abandoned in favor of pure color, texture, and dynamic gesture.
